ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_stories" (
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user story */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the story belongs to */,
  "story_name" TEXT /* Name of the user story */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user story */,
  "story_type" TEXT /* Type of user story (e.g., F, KA) */,
  "story_points" INTEGER /* Estimated story points for the story */,
  "story_points_completed" INTEGER /* Completed story points for the story */,
  "story_status" TEXT /* Status of the story (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the user story */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the user story */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user story was created */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the user story */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user story was last updated */,
  "accepted_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accepted the user story */,
  "accepted_date" TEXT /* Date the user story was accepted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_accepted_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("accepted_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_stories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user story the task belongs to */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_status" TEXT /* Status of the task (e.g., open, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the task */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the task */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the task was created */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the task */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the task was last updated */,
  "assigned_to_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the task is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_assigned_to_id FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sprints" (
  "sprint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sprint */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the sprint belongs to */,
  "sprint_name" TEXT /* Name of the sprint */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sprint */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sprint */,
  "sprint_goal" TEXT /* Goal of the sprint */,
  "sprint_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sprint manager */,
  "created_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the sprint */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the sprint was created */,
  "updated_by_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last updated the sprint */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the sprint was last updated */,
  "sprint_status" TEXT /* Status of the sprint (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sprint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_sprint_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("sprint_manager_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_updated_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sprints_created_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., developer, tester) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the team member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the team member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the team member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the team member was hired */,
  "member_status" TEXT /* Status of the team member (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "story_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user story the contribution belongs to */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member who made the contribution */,
  "contribution_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the contribution made by the team member */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_story_id FOREIGN KEY ("story_id") REFERENCES user_stories ("story_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time log */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the task the log belongs to */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team member who logged the time */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the time was logged */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Number of hours worked */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the work log */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the work log */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the time log was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the time log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_logs_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the notification belongs to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., deadline approaching, sprint goal completed) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the notification */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., read, unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES team_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
